records.subject: Announcement on behalf of subsidiary CSC SOLAR for the acquisition of real estate right-of-use assets
records.fund_name:
Name and nature of the underlying asset (e.g., land located at Sublot XX,
Lot XX, North District, Taichung City):
 Land serial no.884, 884-1 and 925 located at Fuli Section, Longjing Dist.,
 Taichung City, Taiwan. (R.O.C.)
records.commitment_amount_raw:
Where the trading counterparty is a related party, announcement shall also
be made of the reason for choosing the related party as trading counterparty
and the identity of the previous owner, its relationship with the Company
and the trading counterparty, and the previous date and monetary amount of
transfer: DSC is a related party of CSC group. The company plans to lease
 these lots of land for the purpose of setting up solar power generation
 systems. Considering that the vast area is safer and has sufficient
 sunshine, it meets the needs of the company's operations.
 The land is leased by DSC from Port of Taichung, Taiwan International
 Ports Corporation, Ltd. for a total of 50 years.

be made of the reason for choosing the related party as trading counterparty
and the identity of the previous owner, its relationship with the Company
and the trading counterparty, and the previous date and monetary amount of
transfer:
China Steel Machinery Corporation and China Ecotek Corporation have
experience in undertaking related projects for the group and can meet the
